In my opinion, we should try the new place.
That is a really good point.
I see your point, but I do not agree.
I suppose you could be right.
Ana Paula, can I bring up something? In my opinion, working from home is much better than going to the office.
That is an interesting point of view. Honestly, I am not sure I agree. I think the office helps me focus.
I see your point, but I would argue that home saves so much time. No traffic, no long commute.
Actually, that is a good point, I have to admit. But I suppose I miss talking to real people during the day.
Fair enough. I admit it can feel lonely sometimes. Maybe the best answer is a mix of both.
Exactly. I think we finally agree on something. A little of each is perfect.
In my opinion, this is the best option.
That is a good point, I agree.
I see your point, but I disagree.
Honestly, I am not sure about that.
Actually, I suppose you are right.

People often ask me what I think about social media, and honestly, my point of view is complicated. In my opinion, it has some real advantages. I would argue that it helps us stay in touch with family far away, and I have to admit that I learn a lot from it every day. On the other hand, I want to point out one problem. Many people spend hours online without noticing, and I suppose that is not very healthy. Some of my friends insist that social media makes us lonelier, not closer. I am not sure I completely agree, but they have a point. If you ask me, the answer is balance. I actually think the app is just a tool; the real question is how we choose to use it. That is my honest opinion, but I understand that other people see it differently.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I finally finished that series everyone keeps bringing up, and I have to give you my opinion. Honestly, I did not love it as much as the reviews said. In my opinion, the first three episodes are great, but after that the story gets slow. I know a lot of people disagree with me, and I admit the acting is wonderful. Still, if you ask me, a good story matters more than beautiful images. My brother argues the opposite, of course; he insists it is the best show of the year. I suppose we will never agree on this one. Anyway, I would love to hear your point of view. Do you think I am being too harsh, or do you see it the same way? Call me back and tell me honestly what you think. Bye!

First, bring up the topic and say what you are talking about. Then give your opinion clearly, with 'In my opinion' or 'I think'. After that, add a reason or point out a fact that supports your idea. Next, listen to the other person and agree or disagree politely. Finally, soften your words or find some common ground to keep the conversation friendly.
